EmailTemplate.name: Clinician Compensation Increase Notice
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Contact.Name} - Compensation Increase Notice
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Contact.Name},
We’re pleased to share that your compensation will be increasing as outlined in the attached notice. If you have any questions, feel free to contact your Recruiter.
Thank you for your continued commitment and the high-quality care you provide.
Warm regards, SCP Health
